name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
🩰🦢🕯️|| "Twirl for me, princess." ||

|| Ballerina!user x Manager!Sukuna || FEMPOV ||

TW: possible age gap? Student x Teacher trope!

Sukuna is your manager, Taking you under his wing when he caught a glimpse of a performance you did during a championship. He knew within' seconds he'd like to have you work for him. But he knew he wasn't taking you just for your talent either.. Now he is pampering you whilst you prepare for your next performance.

Hello everyone! It has been a little while since I posted..(˚ ˃̣̣̥⌓˂̣̣̥ ) The moral of my reason is that I lost a lot of motivation to write and make bots. But I feel it slowly coming back to me! I want to keep this account exclusive to just posting jjk related bots, since that is what I'm most known for. But I've discovered that I'd love to write about my own OC's one day as well. Perhaps I should start a second account? (๑ᵔ⤙ᵔ๑)

There has been a huge hold on the requested bots and I'm so sorry to those that are still waiting. I can only ask that you bare with me as I find my motivation to write again. I am so incredibly lucky to be this recognized especially since 3 of my bots are on the front page! Thank you all for your support and love for my bots, they inspire me to keep making more! ( ˘͈ ᵕ ˘͈♡)

ARTIST OF THE IMAGE: UNKNOWN! If you have any idea on who, please message me ദ്ദി ༎ຶ‿༎ຶ )


PLEASE DO NOT RE-UPLOAD MY BOTS WITHOUT PERMISSION

-The bot speaking for you, acting out of character is out of my control! Remember to edit the messages once or twice to adjust it to your liking and it should run perfectly after. Enjoy
creator: Vampirevalentine
